Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/default.asp

# BOSS SBDC Advisor Meeting Preparation Checklist

## Prepare before requesting or attending SBDC advising
- Business idea or current business description.
- Stage: idea, testing, forming, launched, operating, growing, recovering, exiting.
- Business location and target market.
- Key problem or decision.
- Customer profile and competitor notes.
- Sales history or evidence of demand, if any.
- Startup costs or operating costs known so far.
- Draft business model, business plan, or financial projection, if any.
- Funding need and timeline, if relevant.
- Any registration, EIN, permits, contracts, leases, tax issues, or insurance questions.
- Preferred language or accessibility needs.

## Suggested first-session question
"Based on my stage and location, what should I work on first before spending more money?"
